description_long: This is a modern entertainment console featuring a rectangular wooden top and metallic side supports. The front face includes two central drawers with metallic handles, flanked by open shelving below for additional storage or display. A flat-screen television sits atop the console, displaying an animated scene. The wood finish is a warm, medium tone, contrasting with the cool, metallic gray of the legs and shelf supports. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or communal spaces. The structure appears sturdy, with ample surface area for supporting electronics and other items.
description: A modern wooden and metal entertainment console with two drawers, open shelves, and a flat-screen TV on top. The design is sleek, sturdy, and functional for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with handles, open shelves, and a TV on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the console's depth, wood grain, and the thin profile of the TV.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the TV and the open shelving structure without visible drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the console's rectangular shape and materials.
